ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (opening entry).

ARM E27 — contrastive activation steering vectors (CAA / Rimsky et al.), local MLX, $0 training, $2 incidental cap. Feasibility proven on mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit. Harness: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E27/bin/{extract_caa.py,eval_caa.py,steering.py}. Repo code read from /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-prep (venv, uv run --no-sync); never touch /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer. Data read-only from _base-20260719 snapshot.

KEY FACT resolved up-front: promoted watcher v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48 metadata says base_model = mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit (hidden 4096, 36 layers) — the drafter_mlx.py docstring's "Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507" is STALE. So the CAA vectors (4096-dim, extracted on the base) align dimensionally with MlxDrafter's model, and the deployment-faithful full-frame path (MlxDrafter = base Qwen3-8B + v002 LoRA adapter, steering.install() applied on the loaded model per drafter_mlx.patch) works AND reproduces the stored v002 probs on the base arm (instrument check, as E22 proved).

PHASES:
1. Extraction: extract_caa.py --db E27/inputs/feedback.db --model Qwen3-8B-4bit --n 400 --out E27/out/vectors.npz. CAA = mean(steer_act - nosteer_act) per layer at the answer position; base model, no adapter.
2. Golden SCREEN (report-only, NO --min-delta): eval_caa.py over layers {8,12,16,20,24} x mags {4,8,16} x signs {+,-} on the 30-row golden watcher-fires set (15 warranted / 15 negative). This 30-row AUC is a coarse compass ONLY — its noise floor is far above the card MDE; NO verdict on it. Pick the single best config by AUC delta_vs_base for full-frame validation. (Screen also run in the adapter regime to match the full-frame's deployment regime for config selection.)
3. FULL-FRAME validation (the arbiter): score the 628-row watcher frame (_base/eval, digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0) via MlxDrafter (base+v002 adapter), base arm (unsteered -> must reproduce stored probs, max|diff| ~0) vs steered arm (best config CAA installed). Persist per-row probs for BOTH arms. Compute paired DeLong: delta, SE_delta, 95% CI, measured pairing rho, paired MDE = 2.8016*SE_delta. Cross-check: base-arm DeLong SE should ~= 0.00998 (card §2, n=628 DeLong row-sampling SE) -> validates the DeLong impl.

CRITERION (instrument-card-v1 forward decision rule): a sentinel-AUC delta is ACTIONABLE iff BOTH (1) the paired 95% CI on the delta excludes 0, AND (2) |delta| >= the applicable paired MDE (2.8016*SE_delta at the MEASURED rho; card reference points 0.0143 @ rho=0.9, 0.0045 @ rho=0.99; unpaired fallback 0.0453). A delta failing either is reported "within noise floor", never a win/loss. Promotion (wiring drafter_mlx.patch) is NOT in scope — measurement + card verdict only.
